hero.lede: Eleven rituals handcrafted in our Marbella workshop. Natural skincare and home soaps formulated with the same exacting standards — Andalusian botanical oils, ISO 16128 certified, recyclable packaging.

dualFeatured.personalDesc: Body wash with colloidal oatmeal, aloe and chamomile. The daily gesture for sensitive skin.
dualFeatured.hogarDesc: Natural cleaner with Málaga lemon and thyme. No harsh sulphates, with the same care as your skin.

lineCosmetica.intro: Our foundational line. Five rituals for body, hair and face — formulated since 2021 under ISO 16128 protocol and dermatologically tested. Botanical material from southern Europe, patient formulation.
lineCosmetica.introEmphasis: Botanical materials from southern Europe, patient formulation.

botanica.body: We don't separate what cares for the skin from what cares for the home. Our essential oils, extracts and plant surfactants are identical in both lines — only the formulation changes. One workshop, one standard.

lineHogar.intro: Natural soaps and cleaners for the surfaces we touch every day. With the same exacting standards we apply to skin: no harsh sulphates, no synthetic fragrances, no toxic residues for whoever cooks with you.
lineHogar.introEmphasis: With the same exacting standards we apply to skin

origen.body: We work with carefully selected local and national suppliers. Olive oil, lavender, chamomile, rosemary — southern ingredients that travel just a few kilometres to our workshop. Proximity is also an ingredient.
origen.bodyEmphasis: all just hours from the workshop.

lineMascota.intro: Because those who keep us company also deserve a thoughtful formula. Two specific rituals — one canine, one feline — with calming actives, no harsh soaps, no toxic residues if they lick their coat after bathing.

newsletter.sub: Be first to know about limited editions and receive 10% off your first order.
newsletter.success: Subscribed. Your first letter is on its way.
newsletter.error: Could not subscribe. Please try again.

popup.title: 10% off your first ritual.
popup.body: Join the correspondence and receive a courtesy code with our first seasonal letter.

footer.brandDesc: Natural skincare and home care, handcrafted in Marbella. Andalusia, Spain.

metadata.homeDescription: Eleven natural rituals handcrafted in Marbella. Skincare and home cleaners with ISO 16128 certification, Andalusian botanicals and recyclable packaging.
metadata.homeKeywords: natural skincare, artisan skincare, home care, natural soap, Marbella, Andalusia, ISO 16128, natural body wash

product.smallBatch: Small batches with human control. Andalusian botanicals, ISO 16128 certification, handcrafted in Andalusia.
